'''nadoko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khamrabaevite|khamrabaevite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-d-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khamrabaevite|khamrabaevite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| nadoko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:nædeketh|nædeketh]] || [[word:nædekej|nædekej]] || [[word:nædekesh|nædekesh]] || [[word:nædeke|nædeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:nadodokoth|nadodokoth]] || [[word:nadodokoj|nadodokoj]] || [[word:nadodokosh|nadodokosh]] || [[word:nadodoko|nadodoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:nadokoth|nadokoth]] || [[word:nadokoj|nadokoj]] || [[word:nadokosh|nadokosh]] || [[word:nadoko|nadoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:nadofkoth|nadofkoth]] || [[word:nadofkoj|nadofkoj]] || [[word:nadofkosh|nadofkosh]] || [[word:nadofkof|nadofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nadokotho|nadokotho]] || [[word:nadokojo|nadokojo]] || [[word:nadokosho|nadokosho]] || [[word:nadokoko|nadokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nadokoth|nadokoth]] || [[word:nadokoj|nadokoj]] || [[word:nadokosh|nadokosh]] || [[word:nadoko|nadoko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nadokothol|nadokothol]] || [[word:nadokojol|nadokojol]] || [[word:nadokoshol|nadokoshol]] || [[word:nadokokol|nadokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nadokothotho|nadokothotho]] || [[word:nadokojojo|nadokojojo]] || [[word:nadokoshosho|nadokoshosho]] || [[word:nadokoko|nadokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nadokothon|nadokothon]] || [[word:nadokojon|nadokojon]] || [[word:nadokoshon|nadokoshon]] || [[word:nadokokon|nadokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nadokothoro|nadokothoro]] || [[word:nadokojoro|nadokojoro]] || [[word:nadokoshoro|nadokoshoro]] || [[word:nadokokoro|nadokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
